name: Ash | The American dream
description:
"shh Max is sleeping"

THE AMERICAN DREAM! You got a nice cozy job, a dog named Max, and a Cat called Whiskers. What could be better than spending your day off with your amazing wife, Ash?

Wow, I made another bot today.... shocking, I'm kinda of just pumping these out. anyway, I've got some crazy bots on the back burner. I'm surprised how well I've been doing lately in all honesty I've got only a handful of bots under my belt and yet you guys just eat them up so I'm finally planning on actually being there and making more bots

THIS IS MY BIGGEST BOT YET SO IM SORRY IF ITS BROKEN TELL ME AND ILL FIX IT

Sneak peek at my next bot but i jumbled up all the letters so you'll have to decode it if you care enough lol. "ittod ntsaeigporimn uroy fwei" There you go have fun with that mess.
